kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=auth, url=https://dummyjson.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://dummyjson.com/auth/login path_url=/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "emilys", "password": "emilyspass"}'

C:\Users\afiac\PycharmProjects\Projet_entreprise2\.venv\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'dummyjson.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://dummyjson.com, headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwidXNlcm5hbWUiOiJlbWlseXMiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImVtaWx5LmpvaG5zb25AeC5kdW1teWpzb24uY29tIiwiZmlyc3ROYW1lIjoiRW1pbHkiLCJsYXN0TmFtZSI6IkpvaG5zb24iLCJnZW5kZXIiOiJmZW1hbGUiLCJpbWFnZSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZHVtbXlqc29uLmNvbS9pY29uL2VtaWx5cy8xMjgiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzU3NzgyMjQsImV4cCI6MTc3ODM3MDIyNH0.sm1w2Hf9Dywu0WLh1B8HmrPh2NtiRy9JO32el30xEUk', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.name: GET On Session

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
